title: [security] OSCORE SSN/nonce reuse risk on NVM failure
description: oscore_ctx_set_sender_seq and NVM persistence callbacks critical to prevent AES-CCM nonce reuse post-reboot. Recent oscore.c changes (b6f7e326d) do not address NVM callback robustness or error paths in oscore_protect_request. Test vectors do not cover reboot scenarios. See oscore.c:1574+ and edhoc export paths. Priority 0 bug.
